name: Universal Store Holdings Limited
analysis: UNI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$7.5700, stop A$5.9994, target A$8.4833 (0.58:1) — then trail it.
